title: Hook
description: Bold stat on dark background: 40% of appointments are no-shows. White text on deep green (#006828) with subtle particle animation.
voiceoverText: Forty percent of healthcare appointments end in no-shows.

title: Problem
description: Realistic clinic waiting room scene. Empty chairs, a frustrated receptionist checking a screen showing missed appointments. Warm golden hour lighting, modern clinic interior with plants.
voiceoverText: Every missed appointment costs your clinic revenue and disrupts patient care.

title: Solution
description: Zavis AI dashboard on a modern monitor showing WhatsApp reminder messages being sent to patients. Green notification badges appearing. Clean UI, professional office environment.
voiceoverText: Zavis AI agents send personalized reminders via WhatsApp, SMS, and email, automatically.

title: Demo
description: Phone screen showing a patient receiving a WhatsApp message from Zavis: appointment confirmation with reschedule option. Patient taps to confirm. Clean UI mockup.
voiceoverText: Automated rescheduling means no more empty slots in your calendar.

title: CTA
description: Zavis logo centered on off-white (#f8f8f6) background. Book a Demo button in Zavis Green (#006828). Website URL: zavis.ai. Clean branded endcard.
voiceoverText: Book your demo today at zavis.ai
